mapper.insert: INSERT INTO contributorApplication ( userId, applicationReason, approvalStatus, submittedAt, reviewerId, reviewedAt, reviewComment, updatedAt ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{applicationReason}, #{status}, #{requestedAt}, #{reviewedBy}, #{reviewedAt}, #{reviewComment}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT applicationId, userId, applicationReason, approvalStatus, submittedAt, reviewerId, reviewedAt, reviewComment, updatedAt FROM contributorApplication WHERE userId = #{userId} ORDER BY submittedAt DESC, applicationId DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT applicationId, userId, applicationReason, approvalStatus, submittedAt, reviewerId, reviewedAt, reviewComment, updatedAt FROM contributorApplication WHERE applicationId = #{requestId}

SELECT applicationId, userId, applicationReason, approvalStatus, submittedAt, reviewerId, reviewedAt, reviewComment, updatedAt FROM contributorApplication WHERE applicationId = #{requestId} FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE contributorApplication SET approvalStatus = #{status}, reviewerId = #{reviewedBy}, reviewedAt = #{reviewedAt}, reviewComment = #{reviewComment}, updatedAt = #{updatedAt} WHERE applicationId = #{requestId}
mapper.select: SELECT cr.applicationId, cr.userId, cr.reviewerId, u.username AS user_name, u.email AS user_email, cr.applicationReason, cr.approvalStatus, cr.reviewComment, cr.submittedAt, cr.reviewedAt, cr.updatedAt FROM contributorApplication cr INNER JOIN `user` u ON u.userId = cr.userId WHERE cr.applicationId = #{requestId}

SELECT cr.applicationId, cr.userId, cr.reviewerId, u.username AS user_name, u.email AS user_email, cr.applicationReason, cr.approvalStatus, cr.reviewComment, cr.submittedAt, cr.reviewedAt, cr.updatedAt FROM contributorApplication cr INNER JOIN `user` u ON u.userId = cr.userId WHERE cr.approvalStatus = 'PENDING' ORDER BY cr.submittedAt ASC, cr.applicationId ASC

SELECT cr.applicationId, u.userId, cr.reviewerId, u.username AS user_name, u.email AS user_email, cr.applicationReason, COALESCE(cr.approvalStatus, 'APPROVED') AS approvalStatus, cr.reviewComment, cr.submittedAt, cr.reviewedAt, COALESCE(cr.updatedAt, u.lastUpdatedAt) AS updatedAt FROM `user` u LEFT JOIN contributorApplication cr ON cr.applicationId = ( SELECT MAX(latest.applicationId) FROM contributorApplication latest WHERE latest.userId = u.userId AND latest.approvalStatus = 'APPROVED' ) WHERE u.isContributor = 1 AND LOWER(u.role) = 'user' ORDER BY COALESCE(cr.reviewedAt, cr.updatedAt, u.lastUpdatedAt) DESC, u.userId ASC
